title: Pan-Seared Fish Bites with Lemon
description: A quick and easy recipe for a delicious fish dish, featuring citrusy lemon flavors.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the fish bites on the prepared baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with garlic powder.
Bake for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, squeeze the lemon juice into a bowl.
Once the fish is done, remove it from the oven and place it on a plate.
Serve the fish hot with a squeeze of lemon and a sprinkle of salt and pepper if desired.
Enjoy your delicious pan-seared fish bites!
